feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,138Chapters: 55/?Kudos: 30

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: Blood, Sweat and Tears
entry.summary:
Author: itsmepaper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,235Chapters: 4/15Kudos: 32

Summary: Merlin disappears in the middle of the night, leaving behind nothing but a scream heard by a nearby servant, a smear of blood, and a castle full of unanswered questions. Arthur is convinced it’s just Merlin being Merlin, until the hours stretch on, the clues grow stranger, and the fear in Camelot becomes impossible to ignore. Arthur goes off on a journey to find the missing Merlin, to bring him home, back to Camelot. But that’s harder than Arthur could have ever imagined.

entry.title: [Podfic] in your heart shall burn
entry.summary:
Author: SpaceshipsAndWine

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 30Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 4

Summary: A decennial hunt draws neighboring princes to Camelot to track a dangerous three-headed beast, but things go south when one of them starts pursuing Merlin instead. Podfic of microcomets' story.

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,137Chapters: 8/20Kudos: 27

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it.Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Curia Regis
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,349Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 24

Summary: A court Adviser that has been under Uther for decades starts to worry about what will happen when the old king dies and his son, Arthur, takes over. So he plans to win the Young prince’s favor by giving him the thing he wants the most… Merlin.

entry.title: Tears and Laughter
entry.summary:
Author: itsmepaper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,687Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 7

Summary: Merlin coughed to get Arthur's attention and it worked. Arthur frowned at Merlin’s tone. “Are you alright? You sound-” Merlin stepped forward. Arthur’s confusion deepened, but he didn’t have time to question it. Merlin’s hand came up, the broken blade glinting for a heartbeat. Gwen screamed his name. "Arthur! Run!"Arthur gasped in shock as he instinctively hit the jug away as the towel dropped, showing his private parts. He quickly wraps the towel around himself, noticing Gwen and Gaius standing there. "Gwen! Gaius! Why was there a jug aimed at my manservant?"When Merlin returns to Camelot under Morgana’s spell, everything goes wrong in ways no one expects. One moment splits into two completely different outcomes - one heartbreaking, one ridiculous - as Arthur faces the consequences of an enchanted Merlin with very different results. Based on A Servant of Two Masters.

entry.title: Dissonance
entry.summary:
Author: BackToDust

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,029Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 167

Summary: Arthur survived the battle of Camlann. Long live the King. But since his return, a door in his mind and heart has been opened. The bond between him and Merlin is shifting, and so is the balance of the universe. A new prophecy begins to take shape, one that reveals the missing note of a broken song. More chapters and tags to come.

entry.title: and you know that it means so much
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,088Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: The truth crept in slowly, unwelcome as winter. He loved Freya. That had never been in doubt. Yet tonight, sitting beside Arthur’s bed, watching him breathe— Something in Merlin had shifted. Something he had not wanted to name.

entry.title: The Magical Experiment
entry.summary:
Author: twobraincellscombined

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,720Chapters: 14/16Kudos: 225

Summary: Arthur asks Merlin to learn magic to see if it can be trusted in defeating Morgana.   "We want to ask someone to learn magic to see if it can be used without corrupting the soul of the person who uses it. Lancelot suggested you be the person we ask."Merlin's lips parted a fraction, "He did?""Indeed. Something about your heart being pure." Arthur brushed the compliment off with a wave of his hand and straightened in his seat, "I know you're scared of magic so you don’t have to do this if you don’t want to but-""I'll do it."

entry.title: Young Hearts, Run Free
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,123Chapters: 6/11Kudos: 162

Summary: Merlin saunters across the room to the table, long legs gracefully striding. As he passes by Arthur, their arms brush against one another. They both gasp at the brief shock of electricity as skin touches skin. Forgetting himself, Arthur reaches out and lightly traces Merlin’s forearm with his index and middle fingers. Merlin stops in wonderment, his gasp coming out as a whisper, as he watches Arthur’s fingers dancing up his arm. He looks up, and Arthur is staring at him intently. “Hi,” says Merlin. “Hi,” Arthur replies. Or It started the night before Arthur faces the wraith of his uncle Tristan de Bois.Merlin decides to give Arthur several gifts.Neither expects those acts to spark an all-consuming relationship that redefines them both — and quietly begins to rewrite their pre-ordained destiny.No longer two sides of the same coin, they become one joined at the heart.This is their story.

entry.title: wandering stranger
entry.summary:
Author: hansuckss

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,787Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 11

Summary: “Maybe we can make our own, write our own story.” “Maybe. Preferably one where we get a happy ending.” “I’d like that.”As the undead’s screams grow louder and their hands clutch at the edges of his clothes, threatening to drag him back into the darkness, a hand grabs his and pulls him farther into the light.   Or; Two boys find themselves in the apocalypse, with nothing but a desire for a safe haven and the ability to discover some type of light amid the never-ending darkness.

entry.title: Amber and Wild Thyme
entry.summary:
Author: Ginkgo_Biloba_Baggins

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,626Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 314

Summary: When Hunith arrives in Camelot with news of an attack, Merlin knows what he has to do. He is perfectly capable of driving away the likes of Kanen’s men by himself; he has been defending Ealdor since he was ten years old. However, he has no idea of the lengths Arthur will go to to protect his poor, misguided manservant - such as adopting a disguise and following him home. A Canon Era AU of S1 E10 The Moment of Truth

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Insufferable Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Araemrys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,125Chapters: 6/12Kudos: 24

Summary: Merlin, the son of the famous bakers in Camelot, had been assigned by his parents to deliver bread for tonight's feast in the castle. That was the first time he met the prince of Camelot, who wasn't like his expectations at all. Arthur Pendragon, the prince of Camelot, returned to the castle after his mission to secure a village from bandits, only to find a boy standing in a room admiring his mother's painting-a boy he found to be insufferable later. From the day they met, they decided that they wouldn't get along well, only to find a shockingly different path in life that they never expected. or Arthur and Merlin didn't like each other. They remained somehow in a complicated state between enemies and a feeling of interest in each other. That was, until one day a sorceress playfully transported them to the future, only to find they were a happy family with a son.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
